signOutModal.title: Sign out?
signOutModal.message: Are you sure you want to sign out of your account?

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and account settings.

personalInfo.title: Personal information
personalInfo.description: Your name, contact details, and location.
personalInfo.phoneHint: So your expert can reach you about your session.
personalInfo.cityHint: Helps match you with nearby in-person specialists.
personalInfo.timezoneHint: Used to display session times correctly.

validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number (e.g. +44 7700 900000).

email.title: Email address
email.description: Used to log in and receive notifications.
email.warning: A verification link will be sent to your new address. Your current email stays active until you confirm the change.
email.pendingNotice: A verification link was sent to {{email}}. Check your inbox to confirm the change.
email.sentLine1: We sent a verification link to <1>{{email}}</1>.
email.sentLine2: Click it to activate your new address. Your current email remains active until then.

errors.required: New email and current password are required.

password.title: Change password
password.description: Requires your current password for confirmation.

errors.tooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters.

password.success: Password changed. You have been signed out of all other sessions.

notifications.title: Email notifications
notifications.description: Choose which emails Sage Nest sends you.

bookingConfirmation.label: Booking confirmation
bookingConfirmation.description: Receive an email when your payment is processed and your booking is confirmed.

sessionReminder.label: Session reminder
sessionReminder.description: Reminders sent 24 hours and 1 hour before your session.

expertCancellation.label: Cancellation by specialist
expertCancellation.description: Receive an email if your specialist cancels an upcoming session.

reschedule.label: Reschedule confirmation
reschedule.description: Receive a confirmation email after you move a booking to a new time.

platformUpdates.label: Platform updates
platformUpdates.description: Occasional product news, tips, and announcements from Sage Nest.

notifications.toastError: Could not save — please try again

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Require an email code each time you sign in.
twoFactor.bodyEnabled: A 6-digit verification code is sent to your email each time you sign in.
twoFactor.bodyDisabled: When enabled, you'll need to enter a one-time code sent to your email on every sign-in. This protects your account and payment information even if your password is compromised.
twoFactor.codeInstructEnable: A 6-digit code was sent to your email. Enter it below to enable two-factor authentication.
twoFactor.codeInstructDisable: A 6-digit code was sent to your email. Enter it below to disable two-factor authentication.

errors.sendFailed: Failed to send code. Try again.
errors.expired: Code expired. Please request a new one.

dataExport.title: Download my data
dataExport.description: Export a copy of all personal data we hold about you (GDPR Article 20).
dataExport.body: Your export will include your name, email, phone number, full booking history, reviews you have left, and all consent records in a structured JSON file.
dataExport.error: Could not generate your data export. Please try again.

legalConsents.title: Legal consents
legalConsents.description: A record of the legal documents you have accepted and your consent choices.
legalConsents.ppRequired: Required to use Sage Nest. Cannot be withdrawn without deleting your account.
legalConsents.tcRequired: Required to book sessions. Cannot be withdrawn without cancelling all bookings and deleting your account.
legalConsents.marketingBody: Occasional product news and tips from Sage Nest. Optional and independent of your bookings.
legalConsents.gdprNote: You can withdraw or re-grant this consent at any time under GDPR Article 7(3). Withdrawal does not affect the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal.
legalConsents.optInSuccess: You have opted in to marketing emails.
legalConsents.optOutSuccess: Marketing consent withdrawn. You will no longer receive marketing emails.
legalConsents.updateError: Could not update marketing consent. Please try again.
legalConsents.withdrawWarning: Withdrawing marketing consent means you will stop receiving product news and tips. Your bookings and account will not be affected.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently erase your personal data. This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.itemName: Your name, email address, and phone number
deleteAccount.itemTextContent: Any free-text content you submitted (e.g. cancellation reasons)
deleteAccount.itemBookings: Booking records (date, service, duration, amount paid, payment reference)
deleteAccount.itemTransactions: Transaction records (payment intent ID, amount, refund status)
deleteAccount.privacyNote: Your personal details will be permanently deleted. Anonymised booking and payment records are retained for legal and tax purposes — these cannot be used to identify you.
deleteAccount.warning: You must cancel any upcoming bookings and wait for all transactions to be settled before your account can be deleted.
deleteAccount.irreversibleNote: Your personal details will be permanently deleted. Anonymised booking and payment records are retained for legal and tax purposes — these cannot be used to identify you.

errors.passwordRequired: Please enter your password to confirm.
errors.failed: Could not delete account. Please try again.
